properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: You and I have seen the light The moment of amnesia has flown away For the Lamb's Book of Life is opened We have seen our names, we're identified We were wandering uncertain Couldn't find our place in this world Until we came into the house of God's bread

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: (We are) Robed in His righteousness Justified by faith Redeemed by perfect Love And covered by His grace To bring to pass this glorious mystery The Holy Son of God Chosen and elected to build the House of God Chosen and elected we are

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Here we stand you and I Awakened to the reality of who we are As we've journey through the book of Ruth We have seen ourselves unveiled before our own eyes We've met our kinsman redeemer, the mighty One of wealth Who paid the perfect price, to bring us back to him again

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: What a day of revelation, that has dawned on you and me It's the moment we have been waiting for the year of jubilee And now we cease to labour For in him we have found rest Now arise and see your reality You are the chosen and elected of God
